## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object that specifies the key when [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecDigestTypeAttribute] attribute is set to one of the HMAC options listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes#Digest-Types]. If this value is not set, the transform will assume a zero length key.

# kSecDigestHMACKeyAttribute

**Global Variable**

The key for HMAC operation.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecDigestHMACKeyAttribute: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object that specifies the key when [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecDigestTypeAttribute] attribute is set to one of the HMAC options listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes#Digest-Types]. If this value is not set, the transform will assume a zero length key.
title: kSecDigestHMACKeyAttribute
